items.title: Visa and Mastercard Near Deal With Merchants That Would Change Rewards Landscape
items.description: The deal under discussion would lower credit-card interchange fees for merchants, but could make it harder for consumers to use rewards cards at the register.

items.title: Every payment method Costco accepts: From EBT to Apple Pay
items.description: Costco is America’s favorite warehouse club, boasting almost twice as many members as its next-biggest rival, Sam’s Club, despite its more expensive membership fees. Another important distinction between the retailers is the payment methods each one accepts. For instance, while you can use any ...
